reapack.name: reaper_maxpane
reapack.desc: MaxPane: Nested Docker Layouts for REAPER

version.author: b451c
version.changelog:
Bug fix release
- Fix crash when capturing Docker or MaxPane itself (#2, #4) - MIDI Editor survives project tab switches via dynamic title matching (#3) - Fix was_visible not cleared on close (#5) - Visual glitches: narrow tab close button, hover sticking, adaptive text color (#7) - Fix toolbar rendering and docking (#6) - Fix stale windows floating after workspace switch + restart (#6) - Auto-detect toggle action for Open Windows captures

version.author: b451c
version.changelog:
Dark mode fix
- Fix pane background color adapting to macOS dark/light mode (#1) - Reparented windows no longer show light grey background in dark mode

version.author: b451c
version.changelog:
Solo pane, tab reorder, keyboard actions, design refactors
New features: - Solo/maximize pane: expand any pane to fill the container (context menu) - Tab reorder within pane: drag tabs left/right to rearrange - Splitter double-click resets ratio to 50/50 - REAPER actions: Next/Prev Tab, Next/Prev Pane, Solo Toggle (bind in Actions dialog)
Improvements: - TabEntry owned storage (eliminates dangling pointer risk) - IsWindow validation for open windows menu - InvalidateRect FALSE everywhere (correct with WM_ERASEBKGND)
Note: Windows and Linux builds are untested. Please report issues on GitHub.

version.author: b451c
version.changelog:
Cross-platform release
- Region Render Matrix added to known windows - Removed MIDI Editor from known windows (requires active MIDI item) - Known windows reorganized into logical groups - Windows x64 and Linux x86_64 support - Central platform abstraction (platform.h) - Portable dialog creation helper - Fixed min/max macro conflicts on Linux

version.author: b451c
version.changelog:
Feature release
- Renamed project: ReDockIt → MaxPane - Diagonal grid lines in empty panes - Fix pane background color for captured windows - Fix DoRelease toggle for Actions window - Fix hint text color on light background
